functions.name: SyncSectionsUsingSourceTimecode
functions.description: Sync section using source timecode

functions.name: SnapSectionsToTimelineUsingSourceTimecode
functions.description: Snap sections to timeline using source timecode

functions.name: SaveDefaultSpawnableState
functions.description: Save the default state of the spawnable.

functions.name: ReplaceBindingWithActors
functions.description: Replaces the binding with the given actors

functions.name: RemoveInvalidBindings
functions.description: Remove missing objects bound to this track

functions.name: RemoveAllBindings
functions.description: Remove all bound actors from this track

functions.name: RemoveActorsFromBinding
functions.description: Removes the given actors from the binding

functions.name: RebindComponent
functions.description: Rebind the component binding to the requested component

functions.name: PasteTracks
functions.description: Paste tracks

functions.name: PasteSections
functions.description: Paste sections

functions.name: PasteFolders
functions.description: Paste folders

functions.name: PasteBindings
functions.description: Paste bindings

functions.name: GetScriptingLayer
functions.description: Retrieve the scripting layer

functions.name: GetCustomBindingType
functions.description: Returns the custom binding type for the given binding, or nullptr for possessables

functions.name: GetCustomBindingsOfType
functions.description: Returns all of the bindings in the sequence of the given custom type.

functions.name: GetCustomBindingObjects
functions.description: In the case that the given binding proxy holds custom bindings, returns an array of the binding objects so properties can be accessed.

functions.name: GetCurveEditor
functions.description: Retrieve the curve editor

functions.name: FixActorReferences
functions.description: Attempts to automatically fix up broken actor references in the current scene

functions.name: CreateCamera
functions.description: Create a cine camera actor and add it to Sequencer

functions.name: CopyTracks
functions.description: Copy tracks

functions.name: CopySections
functions.description: Copy sections

functions.name: CopyFolders
functions.description: Copy folders

functions.name: CopyBindings
functions.description: Copy bindings

functions.name: ConvertToSpawnable
functions.description: Convert to spawnable. If there are multiple objects assigned to the possessable, multiple spawnables will be created.

functions.name: ConvertToPossessable
functions.description: Convert to possessable. If there are multiple objects assigned to the spawnable.

functions.name: ConvertToCustomBinding
functions.description: Convert to a custom binding of the given binding type

functions.name: ChangeActorTemplateClass
functions.description: Sets the actor class for the spawnable or replaceable template, in the case those binding types support templates.

functions.name: BakeTransformWithSettings
functions.description: Bake transform

functions.name: AddSpawnableFromInstance
functions.description: Add a new binding to this sequence that will spawn the specified object.

functions.name: AddSpawnableFromClass
functions.description: Add a new binding to this sequence that will spawn the specified class.

functions.name: AddActorsToBinding
functions.description: Assigns the given actors to the binding

functions.name: AddActors
functions.description: Add existing actors to Sequencer. Tracks will be automatically added based on default track settings.
